description: When the owner does not know where the application will run, the agent walks them through choosing and configuring a hosting account in plain language, honestly isolating the steps only the human account-holder can do, rather than choosing silently or pretending to act as them.
asA: non-coding product owner who does not know my hosting options
iWant: to be walked through choosing and setting up somewhere to run my app, in plain language
soThat: I can make and act on the hosting decision without already being an expert
title: Hosting-choice guidance when the owner is unsure

acceptanceCriteria.description: When the owner does not know where the app will run, the agent runs a hosting-choice walkthrough rather than choosing silently
acceptanceCriteria.given: an owner who does not know their hosting options
acceptanceCriteria.then: the guidance directs the agent to run a hosting-choice walkthrough instead of silently selecting a host

acceptanceCriteria.description: The walkthrough explains the options in plain language
acceptanceCriteria.when: it presents hosting options to the owner
acceptanceCriteria.then: it requires plain-language explanation with no unexplained jargon

acceptanceCriteria.description: Steps only the human account-holder can do are isolated and named honestly
acceptanceCriteria.given: the walkthrough reaching steps only the account-holder can perform (sign-ups, billing, tokens, CLI authentication)
acceptanceCriteria.then: the guidance requires them to be isolated and named honestly as the human's to do, not performed silently by the agent nor pretended

acceptanceCriteria.description: The walkthrough covers configuring the chosen account, not only naming a provider
acceptanceCriteria.given: a hosting choice the owner has made
acceptanceCriteria.when: the walkthrough continues past the choice
acceptanceCriteria.then: the guidance requires it to cover configuring the account - accounts, tokens and CLI setup - not just naming a provider
